CVEDetector: {"Source": "CVE FEED","Title": "CVE-2026-41016 - Apache Airflow Providers SMTP: No certificate validation on SMTP STARTTLS connections in SMTP provider","Content": "CVE ID :CVE-2026-41016Published : April 30, 2026, 10:16 a.m. | 56 minutes agoDescription :Apache Airflow's SMTP provider `SmtpHook` called Python's `smtplib.SMTP.starttls()` without an SSL context, so no certificate validation was performed on the TLS upgrade.
